title: 有馬記念の後に・磨斧作針

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Classic Triple Crown under her belt and
an impressive showing in the Arima Kinen,
Symboli Rudolf sets her sights on the shield of the
spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On returning to the waiting room, she is greeted
by Air Groove, but the vice-president seems
exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing that she is the reason Air Groove has
been running herself ragged, Symboli Rudolf
resolves not to skimp on her presidential duties.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the year comes to an end, it seems that the
pair's desire to lighten one another's burdens is
preventing them from seeing eye to eye.
